languages.text: "Индуцированное безумие..." {n}Эоганн заинтересованно переводит взгляд с одного беженца на другого.{/n} "Разве могла простая последовательность эфирных волн так жестоко искалечить разумы этих людей? Сомневаюсь. Источник столь деструктивного вокс-сигнала заслуживает тщательного изучения, и это неоспоримый факт".

"Induced insanity..." {n}Eogunn shifts his gaze from one refugee to another with interest.{/n} "Could a mere sequence of transmission waves have so cruelly crippled the minds of these people? I doubt it. The source of such a destructive vox-signal merits thorough investigation, and this is an incontrovertible fact."
languages.original_text: "Индуцированное безумие..." {n}Эоганн заинтересованно переводит взгляд с одного беженца на другого.{/n} "Разве могла простая последовательность эфирных волн так жестоко искалечить разумы этих людей? Сомневаюсь. Источник столь деструктивного вокс-сигнала заслуживает тщательного изучения, и это неоспоримый факт".

I doubt it. The source of such a destructive vox-signal merits thorough investigation, and this is an incontrovertible fact."

I doubt it. The source of such a destructive vox-signal merits thorough investigation, and this is an incontrovertible fact."

languages.text: «Locura inducida...». {n}Eogunn recorre a los refugiados con una mirada de interés.{/n} «¿Podría una simple secuencia de ondas de transmisión haber trastornado así las mentes de esta gente? Lo dudo. El origen de una señal de voco tan destructiva es algo que merece la pena investigar, y eso es un hecho irrefutable».
languages.original_text: "Induced insanity..." {n}Eogunn shifts his gaze from one refugee to another with interest.{/n} "Could a mere sequence of transmission waves have so cruelly crippled the minds of these people? I doubt it. The source of such a destructive vox-signal merits thorough investigation, and this is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: «Locura inducida...». {n}Eogunn recorre a los refugiados con una mirada de interés.{/n} «¿Podría una simple secuencia de ondas de transmisión haber trastornado así las mentes de esta gente? Lo dudo. El origen de una señal de voco tan destructiva es algo que merece la pena investigar, y eso es un hecho irrefutable».

languages.text: “诱发性精神失常……”{n}伊奥贡饶有兴致地打量着一个又一个难民。{/n}“仅仅一串传输波序列，就能如此残忍地摧毁这些人的心智吗？我对此深表怀疑。破坏性如此大的音阵信号，其源头绝对值得彻底调查，这一点毋庸置疑。”
languages.original_text: "Induced insanity..." {n}Eogunn shifts his gaze from one refugee to another with interest.{/n} "Could a mere sequence of transmission waves have so cruelly crippled the minds of these people? I doubt it. The source of such a destructive vox-signal merits thorough investigation, and this is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: “诱发性精神失常……”{n}伊奥贡饶有兴致地打量着一个又一个难民。{/n}“仅仅一串传输波序列，就能如此残忍地摧毁这些人的心智吗？我对此深表怀疑。破坏性如此大的音阵信号，其源头绝对值得彻底调查，这一点毋庸置疑。”

languages.text: "Induzierter Wahnsinn ... {n}Eogunn lässt seinen Blick interessiert über die Flüchtlinge schweifen.{/n} "Könnte eine bloße Sequenz von Übertragungen den Verstand dieser Leute derart geschädigt haben? Wohl kaum. Die Quelle eines derart zerstörerischen Voxsignals erfordert eine eingehende Untersuchung. Das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache."
languages.original_text: "Induced insanity..." {n}Eogunn shifts his gaze from one refugee to another with interest.{/n} "Could a mere sequence of transmission waves have so cruelly crippled the minds of these people? I doubt it. The source of such a destructive vox-signal merits thorough investigation, and this is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: "Induzierter Wahnsinn ... {n}Eogunn lässt seinen Blick interessiert über die Flüchtlinge schweifen.{/n} "Könnte eine bloße Sequenz von Übertragungen den Verstand dieser Leute derart geschädigt haben? Wohl kaum. Die Quelle eines derart zerstörerischen Voxsignals erfordert eine eingehende Untersuchung. Das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache."

languages.text: « Aliénation mentale induite... {n}Eogunn observe tour à tour les réfugiés d'un œil curieux.{/n} Se pourrait-il qu'une simple séquence d'ondes de transmission ait si cruellement estropié l'esprit de ces gens ? J'en doute. La source d'un signal-vox aussi destructeur mérite une enquête approfondie, c'est un fait indéniable. »
languages.original_text: "Induced insanity..." {n}Eogunn shifts his gaze from one refugee to another with interest.{/n} "Could a mere sequence of transmission waves have so cruelly crippled the minds of these people? I doubt it. The source of such a destructive vox-signal merits thorough investigation, and this is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: « Aliénation mentale induite... {n}Eogunn observe tour à tour les réfugiés d'un œil curieux.{/n} Se pourrait-il qu'une simple séquence d'ondes de transmission ait si cruellement estropié l'esprit de ces gens ? J'en doute. La source d'un signal-vox aussi destructeur mérite une enquête approfondie, c'est un fait indéniable. »

languages.text: "Tetiklenmiş delilik..." {n}Eogunn, bakışlarını ilgiyle bir mülteciden diğerine kaydırıyor.{/n} "Sadece bir dizi iletim dalgası, bu insanların zihinlerini böylesine acımasızca sakat bırakmış olabilir mi? Şüpheliyim. Böylesine yıkıcı bir voks sinyalinin kaynağı, kapsamlı bir araştırmayı hak ediyor ve bu tartışılmaz bir gerçektir."
languages.original_text: "Induced insanity..." {n}Eogunn shifts his gaze from one refugee to another with interest.{/n} "Could a mere sequence of transmission waves have so cruelly crippled the minds of these people? I doubt it. The source of such a destructive vox-signal merits thorough investigation, and this is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: "Tetiklenmiş delilik..." {n}Eogunn, bakışlarını ilgiyle bir mülteciden diğerine kaydırıyor.{/n} "Sadece bir dizi iletim dalgası, bu insanların zihinlerini böylesine acımasızca sakat bırakmış olabilir mi? languages.text: 「誘発された狂気…」{n}エオグンは興味を持って難民一人一人をじっと見つめる。{/n}「単なる電波の伝播列が、これほど残酷に人々の心を傷つけたとは考えにくい。破壊的なヴォックス信号の源は徹底的に調査されるべきだ。これは確かな事実である。」
languages.original_text: "Induced insanity..." {n}Eogunn shifts his gaze from one refugee to another with interest.{/n} "Could a mere sequence of transmission waves have so cruelly crippled the minds of these people? I doubt it. The source of such a destructive vox-signal merits thorough investigation, and this is an incontrovertible fact."
